blurb_en:
Microsoft canceled most internal Claude Code licenses across its Experiences and Devices division — the team behind Windows, Office 365, Teams, and Surface — after the token-based AI coding tool burned through the division's annual AI budget in months.
• Engineers loved it. That was the problem.
• Uber had the same experience: 5,000 engineers running Claude Code at $500–2,000 per engineer per month exhausted the company's entire $3.4 billion AI budget in four months.
• Engineers are being redirected to GitHub Copilot, Microsoft's own CLI coding tool — which Microsoft already owns and therefore doesn't bill per token.
• The tool wasn't cut for underperformance. It was cut for overperformance, which is either a ringing endorsement or the world's most expensive user-acceptance test.
• For companies integrating AI into hardware or creative workflows: the era of 'unlimited AI' may be giving way to the era of 'who approved this invoice.'
blurb_zh:
微软在其体验与设备部门（负责Windows、Office 365、Teams和Surface）取消了大部分Claude Code内部授权，原因是这款按Token计费的AI编程工具在数月内烧完了部门全年AI预算。
• 工程师们太爱用了——这才是问题所在。
• Uber也遭遇同样情况：5000名工程师使用Claude Code，每人每月花费500至2000美元，四个月内耗尽了34亿美元全年AI预算。
• 微软工程师将被引导至GitHub Copilot——微软自家的命令行编程工具，不按Token计费。
• 这款工具不是因为没用才被砍掉的，而是因为太好用了。
• 对于将AI整合进硬件或创意工作流的公司：“无限AI”时代，可能正在让位于“这张账单谁批的”时代。
verification_notes: Confirmed via The Next Web, AI Weekly (x2), PeopleMatters, Medium. Uber $3.4B budget and per-engineer costs cross-referenced across multiple outlets. Microsoft's June 30 deadline from PeopleMatters.

blurb_en:
OpenAI CEO Sam Altman told a Commonwealth Bank of Australia conference in Sydney on May 26 that he was 'delighted to be wrong' about the AI jobs apocalypse he once confidently predicted.
• He said OpenAI was 'pretty wrong' on the social and economic impact of AI, while claiming to be 'roughly right' on the technology itself.
• He previously said AI would 'probably replace most of the jobs people do today' and that entire categories of white-collar work would be 'totally, totally gone.'
• Fortune noted that both Altman and Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei are walking back apocalyptic job predictions right as OpenAI eyes a blockbuster IPO and Anthropic closes its $30 billion Series H.
• Yale Budget Lab data shows no meaningful change in unemployment for high-AI-exposure workers through March 2026.
• Being professionally wrong about AI is, apparently, no impediment to being professionally successful in AI.
blurb_zh:
OpenAI首席执行官山姆·奥特曼5月26日在澳大利亚联邦银行悉尼会议上表示，他对自己曾自信预言的AI就业末日「感到很高兴自己错了」。
• 他承认OpenAI在AI社会和经济影响上「相当出错」，但仍坚称对技术本身的预判「大致正确」。
• 他曾预言AI将「大概率取代大多数人的工作」，整类白领职位将「彻底消失」——这些均未成真。
• 《财富》杂志指出，奥特曼与Anthropic CEO达里奥·阿莫迪几乎同步收回末日预言，恰好在OpenAI筹备IPO、Anthropic完成300亿美元融资之际。
• 在AI领域，预测失准似乎并不妨碍专业上的成功。
verification_notes: CBA Sydney conference May 26 confirmed across Fortune, Euronews, Time, TechRadar, Entrepreneur. 'Delighted to be wrong' quote confirmed across multiple outlets. Yale Budget Lab data cited by TechRadar.

blurb_en:
Spotify co-CEO Alex Norström told the Financial Times this week that the company's expanding AI-generated music offerings are a 'controlled' alternative to unregulated AI 'slop' — his word — currently flooding streaming platforms.
• The defense came days after Spotify announced a deal with Universal Music Group allowing Premium subscribers to create licensed AI covers and remixes.
• Norström argued that Spotify's model is 'legal' and 'controlled,' contrasting it with unlicensed AI tracks that already account for 30–44% of daily uploads to Deezer.
• Critics noted that framing AI music as 'controlled slop' rather than 'no slop' does not land as the compliment he intended.
• Spotify's stock rose 18% on the UMG deal announcement.
• A Spotify executive using the word 'slop' to defend Spotify's own product is a new kind of brand strategy.
blurb_zh:
Spotify联席CEO亚历克斯·诺斯特伦本周告诉《金融时报》，Spotify扩张中的AI生成音乐产品，是对平台上泛滥的未授权AI「垃圾音乐」（他的原话）的「可控」替代。
• 此番表态发生在Spotify与环球音乐集团签署协议数天后——该协议允许高级订阅用户创作获授权的AI翻唱和混音。
• 诺斯特伦称Spotify的模式「合法」且「可控」，区别于目前占Deezer每日上传量30-44%的未授权AI音乐。
• 批评者指出，将AI音乐定性为「可控垃圾」而非「非垃圾」，并不是他期待的那种背书。
• 消息公布后，股价上涨18%。
verification_notes: FT interview confirmed via Irish Times, Digital Music News, Neowin, Seeking Alpha. 'Controlled slop' framing from Digital Music News headline. UMG deal confirmed via prior DB entry 2026-05-25-spotify-umg-ai-covers-deal. Deezer 44% stat from prior verified research.

blurb_en:
Connecticut Governor Ned Lamont signed SB5 — the Connecticut Artificial Intelligence Responsibility and Transparency Act — on May 27, completing a two-year legislative process.
• The 39-section law covers AI companion chatbots, automated employment decisions, social media safety for minors, and whistleblower protections for foundation model developers.
• Most provisions take effect October 1, 2026, giving companies four months to comply.
• The whistleblower clause covers frontier models trained using more than 10^26 computing operations — a threshold only models like Anthropic's Mythos are known to approach.
• Connecticut joins Colorado as one of a growing patchwork of US states filling the federal AI regulation vacuum.
blurb_zh:
康涅狄格州州长内德·拉蒙特于5月27日签署了《人工智能责任与透明度法》（SB5），完成历时两年的立法程序。
• 这部共39节的法律涵盖AI伴侣聊天机器人、自动化就业决策、未成年人社交媒体安全，以及大型基础模型开发者的举报人保护条款。
• 大多数条款将于2026年10月1日生效，企业约有四个月合规期。
• 举报人保护条款适用于训练计算量超过10^26次运算的前沿模型——目前仅Anthropic的Mythos级模型已知接近这一量级。
• 康涅狄格州与科罗拉多州并列，成为填补美国联邦AI监管空白的各州立法拼图之一。
verification_notes: May 27 signing confirmed by DLA Piper, Davis Wright Tremaine, Fisher Phillips, Freshfields. CT Mirror confirmed bill passage May 1. Previously tracked since Run 2 (see 2026-05-04-connecticut-ai-bill-sb5).

blurb_en:
Anthropic released Claude Opus 4.8 on May 28 alongside Dynamic Workflows, a feature that lets a single Claude Code session plan and deploy up to 1,000 parallel subagents on large codebases — without occupying the context window.
• The model arrived 41 days after Opus 4.7, Anthropic's fastest major release cycle to date.
• Fast mode is now three times cheaper than on Opus 4.7, running at 2.5x normal speed.
• VentureBeat described the alignment improvements as 'near-Mythos level' — a reference to Anthropic's withheld frontier model that reportedly triggered White House AI oversight discussions in April.
• Available on Claude API, Amazon Bedrock, Google Vertex AI, Microsoft Foundry, GitHub Copilot, and GitLab — the same week Microsoft internally canceled its Claude Code licenses.
• The universe has a sense of timing.
blurb_zh:
Anthropic于5月28日发布了Claude Opus 4.8，同时推出动态工作流（Dynamic Workflows）功能，允许单次Claude Code会话规划并部署最多1000个并行子智能体处理大型代码库，无需占用上下文窗口。
• 距Opus 4.7发布仅41天，这是Anthropic迄今最快的主要迭代周期。
• 快速模式比Opus 4.7便宜三倍，运行速度提升2.5倍。
• VentureBeat将对齐性改进描述为「接近Mythos级别」——指的是Anthropic那个据报道曾引发白宫AI监管讨论的封存前沿模型。
• 同一周内，微软在内部取消了Claude Code授权。宇宙自有其时机。
verification_notes: Official Anthropic blog confirms May 28 release and Dynamic Workflows. Confirmed via TechCrunch, VentureBeat, Axios, Slashdot, gHacks. 1,000-subagent cap from MarkTechPost. Near-Mythos framing is VentureBeat characterization, not Anthropic's official language.
